name: Satyaa Sachee
overview: Drawn into the Swarup family by fate, Sachee marries the troubled Shaurya. Determined to protect her sister, Satyaa chooses to wed his cousin. In a patriarchal home filled with secrets, their love for each other becomes their hope & strength.

trailers.title: Satyaa Sachee | Naya Dharavahik | Jald Hi | @sunneo
